items.title: PwC's US boss Paul Griggs says partners who resist AI have no place at the firm, and it plans to convert some services into AI-powered automated tools (Stephen Foley/Financial Times)

items.title_en: PwC's US boss Paul Griggs says partners who resist AI have no place at the firm, and it plans to convert some services into AI-powered automated tools (Stephen Foley/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 普华永道美国老板 Paul Griggs 表示，抵制人工智能的合作伙伴在该公司没有立足之地，该公司计划将一些服务转变为人工智能驱动的自动化工具（Stephen Foley/《金融时报》）

items.title: Baidu joins Alibaba in raising prices for its AI computing power-related services by ~5% to 30% and its parallel file storage system by 30% from April 18 (South China Morning Post)
items.title_original: Baidu joins Alibaba in raising prices for its AI computing power-related services by ~5% to 30% and its parallel file storage system by 30% from April 18 (South China Morning Post)
items.title_en: Baidu joins Alibaba in raising prices for its AI computing power-related services by ~5% to 30% and its parallel file storage system by 30% from April 18 (South China Morning Post)
items.title_zh: 百度与阿里巴巴一起从 4 月 18 日起将其人工智能算力相关服务的价格提高约 5% 至 30%，并将其并行文件存储系统的价格提高 30%（《南华早报》）
items.title_bilingual: 百度与阿里巴巴一起从 4 月 18 日起将其人工智能算力相关服务的价格提高约 5% 至 30%，并将其并行文件存储系统的价格提高 30%（《南华早报》） / Baidu joins Alibaba in raising prices for its AI computing power-related services by ~5% to 30% and its parallel file storage system by 30% from April 18 (South China Morning Post)

items.title: Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)
items.title_original: Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)
items.title_en: Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)
items.title_zh: 参议员玛莎·布莱克本 (Marsha Blackburn) 发布了参议院《特朗普美国人工智能法案》草案，这是一个取代各州人工智能法律的联邦框架，其中纳入了 KOSA 和《无假货法案》（Oma Seddiq/彭博社法律）
items.title_bilingual: 参议员玛莎·布莱克本 (Marsha Blackburn) 发布了参议院《特朗普美国人工智能法案》草案，这是一个取代各州人工智能法律的联邦框架，其中纳入了 KOSA 和《无假货法案》（Oma Seddiq/彭博社法律） / Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)

items.title: The US goods trade deficit hit a record $1.2T in 2025, driven by a 60% rise in imports of computers and chips to $450B+ since President Trump's inauguration (Ana Swanson/New York Times)
items.title_original: The US goods trade deficit hit a record $1.2T in 2025, driven by a 60% rise in imports of computers and chips to $450B+ since President Trump's inauguration (Ana Swanson/New York Times)
items.title_en: The US goods trade deficit hit a record $1.2T in 2025, driven by a 60% rise in imports of computers and chips to $450B+ since President Trump's inauguration (Ana Swanson/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 自特朗普总统就职以来，由于计算机和芯片进口增长 60%，达到 450B+ 美元，美国商品贸易逆差将在 2025 年达到创纪录的 1.2T 美元（Ana Swanson/纽约时报）
items.title_bilingual: 自特朗普总统就职以来，由于计算机和芯片进口增长 60%，达到 450B+ 美元，美国商品贸易逆差将在 2025 年达到创纪录的 1.2T 美元（Ana Swanson/纽约时报） / The US goods trade deficit hit a record $1.2T in 2025, driven by a 60% rise in imports of computers and chips to $450B+ since President Trump's inauguration (Ana Swanson/New York Times)

items.title: Former Red Dead Redemption 2 Developer reaction to the DLSS 5: "Whoa. Hold on. No, no, no. This isn't just some lighting, dude. What the f... this is like a complete AI re-render. You're no longer looking at the game anymore. This is scary."
items.title_original: Former Red Dead Redemption 2 Developer reaction to the DLSS 5: "Whoa. Hold on. No, no, no. This isn't just some lighting, dude. What the f... this is like a complete AI re-render. You're no longer looking at the game anymore. This is scary."
items.title_en: Former Red Dead Redemption 2 Developer reaction to the DLSS 5: "Whoa. Hold on. No, no, no. This isn't just some lighting, dude. What the f... this is like a complete AI re-render. You're no longer looking at the game anymore. This is scary."
items.title_zh: 前《荒野大镖客：救赎 2》开发者对 DLSS 5 的反应：“哇哦。等等。不，不，不。这不仅仅是一些灯光，伙计。这到底是啥……这就像一个完整的 AI 重新渲染。你不再看游戏了。这太可怕了。”
